arcs.name: Mugen Train Movie
arcs.note: A canon film that directly continues the story from Season 1. It was later re-adapted as the first 7 episodes of Season 2. Viewers can watch either the movie or the TV arc.

arcs.name: Mugen Train Arc
arcs.note: A 7-episode TV adaptation of the Mugen Train movie, with the first episode being entirely new anime-original content.

arcs.name: Infinity Castle Arc
arcs.note: Film I ('Part 1: Akaza Returns', July 2025) covers ch 140–157. Film II will cover the remainder of this arc. Chapter split and release date not yet officially confirmed.

arcs.name: Sunrise Countdown Arc
arcs.note: Will be covered by Film III of the Infinity Castle trilogy. Release date not yet officially confirmed.

episodes.note: Released July 18 2025 in Japan. First film of the Infinity Castle trilogy adapting the final arc of the manga.

watchGuide.title: Season 1
watchGuide.subtitle: 26 episodes
watchGuide.note: Watch all 26 episodes. Ends right as the Mugen Train story begins.

watchGuide.label: Mugen Train — Movie or TV?
watchGuide.note: Both cover the same manga chapters. The movie came first; the TV arc is a re-edit with one added anime-original intro episode.

options.title: Mugen Train (Film)
options.subtitle: 1 film · 117 min
options.note: The original theatrical version. Tighter pacing, no filler. Recommended.

options.title: Mugen Train Arc (TV)
options.subtitle: 7 episodes · Season 2 Part 1
options.note: Ep 27 is anime-original content. Eps 28–33 are the movie re-edited into TV format. Fine to watch, but the original film is better.

watchGuide.title: Entertainment District Arc
watchGuide.subtitle: 11 episodes · Season 2 Part 2
watchGuide.note: Continues directly after Mugen Train. One of the most acclaimed arcs in the series.

watchGuide.title: Infinity Castle Film Trilogy
watchGuide.subtitle: 3 films · Film I released 2025
watchGuide.note: Film I ('Part 1: Akaza Returns') released July 18 2025 (Japan) / Sept 12 2025 (international), covers Ch 140–157. Films II and III will cover Ch 158–205. No official chapter split or release dates confirmed yet.
